I'm Ruchin
AI / ML Engineer

I'm Very Flexible With Time Zone Communications.

I am an AI/ML Engineer based in Ahmedabad, India. I am very passionate about building intelligent systems and solving real-world problems with AI. I thrive on collaboration, cutting-edge research, and creating impactful technology.

My interests span Computer Vision, Generative AI, RAG systems, and Intelligent Automation. I stay updated on emerging AI trends and leverage state-of-the-art tools to build production-ready applications.

IEEE CICN 2026 published researcher. Let's connect and innovate to shape the future of AI together.

06 / Research

IEEE Publication

IEEE CICN 2026 — Accepted & Published
DOI: Pending assignment · Conference proceedings

Adaptive Traffic Signal Control at Four-Way Intersections Using YOLOv8 Vehicle Detection: A Two-Stage Proportional Allocation Approach for Indian Urban Road Conditions

Conference: IEEE CICN 2026 Domain: Computer Vision · Real-Time AI Systems Focus: Indian Urban Road Conditions

An AI-powered adaptive traffic signal control system using YOLOv8 vehicle detection at four-way urban intersections. A custom two-stage proportional allocation algorithm dynamically optimizes signal timing based on live traffic density, with weighted prioritization for motorcycles, cars, buses, and trucks. Includes fallback mechanisms, anti-starvation logic, and a real-time monitoring dashboard with live signal phase control.

31.1%
Reduction in weighted vehicle waiting time vs fixed-time signals
4-Way
Real urban four-way intersection architecture tested
Live
Real-time monitoring dashboard with signal phase control
YOLOv8
Multi-class vehicle detection with priority weighting
PythonYOLOv8OpenCV NumPyComputer VisionReal-Time Systems Signal ControlTraffic Optimization
